title: Residential Cleaning Business - Recurring Revenue Lorain County, OH
supportTraining: The new owner will receive two and a half weeks of comprehensive initial training, followed by ongoing operational support from our team of experts for the life of the business. Robust training tools are available to ensure employees are fully equipped for success. Dedicated marketing professionals
description:
Scalable In-Demand Business - Energetic Entrepreneur Wanted

Take the reins of a trusted, well-loved local business serving Lorain County, OH. This residential cleaning service runs Monday through Friday, 8 a.m. to 5 p.m.—no nights, no weekends—giving you the chance to own a business and enjoy a work and life balance.

If you're a driven entrepreneur ready to lead an established business and dedicate yourself fully to accelerating its growth, this opportunity is for you. This is a hands-on role—not a semi-absentee investment.

Backed by a reputation for dependable, high-quality service, this business has cultivated a loyal customer base and earned recognition as a trusted name in the community. With more families seeking support to balance busy lifestyles, the demand for professional home cleaning continues to rise—creating a prime opportunity for a new owner to step in, lead with confidence, and scale a thriving hometown business.

Highlights:
• Turnkey Setup: With proven systems already in place, you'll be able to focus on leading your team, building strong customer relationships, and growing the business—while scheduling, billing, and day-to-day operations run smoothly in the background.

• Smart Tools: Easy-to-use software helps you stay on top of things, providing real-time info to keep the business running efficiently.

• Enjoy Your Life: This business fits into a Monday–Friday lifestyle, giving you more time for family, friends, and the things that matter most.

Additional Perks:

• One-on-one business coaching with folks who know the industry inside and out
• Centralized lead generation and marketing tools to help you grow without all the guesswork

Ad#:2464676
